top_signals.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX IPO could become bitcoin’s latest headwind
top_signals.summary: SpaceX setting aside up to 30% of IPO shares for retail investors could prompt investors to exit crypto assets like Bitcoin and Ethereum.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Major US Banks Face Federal Probe Over Debanking Allegations
top_signals.summary: Federal prosecutors are looking into whether some of Wall Street’s biggest lenders illegally dropped customers for political reasons, according to a person familiar with the probe.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Ipsos Poll Shows Majority of Adults Would Rejoin EU
top_signals.summary: Alastair Campbell, co-host The Rest Is Politics, and Sir Jacob Rees-Mogg, presenter for GB News, talk about what could happen if there was a vote to rejoin the EU. They speak to Mishal Husain at a Bloomberg.com subscriber-only event held in London on June 10. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Navy stands up naval support activity in Western Australia
top_signals.summary: As part of the AUKUS security pact, NSA Stirling will provide support for personnel assigned to Submarine Rotational Force-West.
